evals.prompt: I just got a new MacBook Pro and I want to start building agents with Antigravity. How do I get everything set up? I already have Homebrew installed.
evals.expected_output: A clear, ordered installation guide covering: agy CLI, agents-cli, GCP ADK skills via agents-cli setup, and Google Cloud skills via npx skills add google/skills. Should include macOS-specific commands and verification steps.

evals.prompt: I'm trying to use the agents-cli but I get 'command not found'. I also need to install the GCP skills for Claude Code. I'm on Ubuntu 22.04.
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis and fix for missing agents-cli (uv tool install google-agents-cli), plus instructions for installing GCP skills via npx skills add google/skills. Should include Linux-specific PATH notes.

evals.prompt: What's the fastest way to get agy and all the Google skills installed in one shot? I already have Node 20 and Python 3.12.
evals.expected_output: Concise path: install agy via curl script, then agents-cli via uv, then agents-cli setup for ADK skills, then npx skills add google/skills for cloud skills. Verification commands at the end.
